title: ADR-0016 fixes default-deny allowlist as MCP authorization layer
rationale: ADR-0010 already pins ToolManifest mutability; this ADR makes the allowlist registration site the single authorization layer for MCP-backed reviewers

title: Threat-model trichotomy: policy-only / partially-enforced / unimplemented / enforced
rationale: Every TM finding for VIGOR (docs/security/threat-model.md, VIGOR-f44c) is qualified by which kind of drift it represents: an ADR commits to a control but no code enforces it (policy-only); some call sites enforce it but others do not (partially-enforced); not in spec at all (unimplemented); a code anchor demonstrates the control rejecting violations (enforced). Without this trichotomy STRIDE matrices collapse into 'security is hard' — with it, every finding pins to a specific drift between docs/adr/* and packages/*.

name: stride-matrix-with-code-anchors
description: For VIGOR-scoped threat models: emit a STRIDE-per-component matrix (one threat per S/T/R/I/D/E cell), then break out detailed scenarios numbered T1..Tn for the parent task spec's named gaps. Every cell carries a path:line code anchor and an enforcement label. The detailed scenarios then drive a prioritised-mitigations table with P0/P1/P2 classification keyed to deployment-shape (P0 = broken in current shape; P1 = broken in near-target shape; P2 = drift / observability).

name: strategic-doc-classification-feeds-backlog
description: Strategic deployment docs synthesize a closed-scout report (VIGOR-4293) by mirroring its structure: internal survey, external survey, per-question recommendations. Each recommendation gets a classification (foundational/tactical/observational/future) that feeds the sibling seeds backlog and companion ADRs verbatim. Keeps ADR-sibling and backlog-sibling synchronized without rot-prone cross-references.

title: Pick structured documents as VIGOR's next modality (ADR-0019)
rationale: Structured documents (LaTeX/Markdown→PDF) win the loop-fit scoring matrix (20/20) over slides (19), code (18), music notation (17): symbolic textual IR, fast deterministic compile (5-30s), objective reviewers via compile-log parsing, large iteration delta (citation/overfull errors fixed iteration-to-iteration). No DomainAdapter contract changes required; reuses photo/manim subprocess + injectable-runner pattern. Code excluded despite high score due to commoditisation by Cursor/Claude Code/Aider; music notation deferred to Phase 9 once ADR-0020's time-series convention is exercised.
